test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient for the acceptance criteria; the live GUI regression now asserts per-phase prompt-text non-intersection across movement, defensive-fire, offensive-fire, and mine-placement states, while tactical/source-level regressions still lock the shared prompt-spacing seam and relayout behavior.
